entries.summary: Dashboard Analytics Charts — full-stack WIP (chưa commit). BE: GET /tenants/:id/stats API trả daily conversations, daily customers, channel distribution, bot performance. FE: DashboardCharts component mới với 4 Recharts biểu đồ (Area, Pie, Bar, Horizontal Bar). Dashboard page redesigned: 4 stat cards clickable (Bot AI, Kênh kết nối, Tài liệu tri thức, Khách hàng) thay thế quota cards cũ. Thêm recharts@3.8.1 dependency.

backend: GET /tenants/:id/stats?days=N endpoint: Prisma groupBy cho conversations/customers theo ngày, channel distribution, bot performance
TenantService.getStats(): fill missing days, resolve agent names
findById: thêm _count select (channelConnections, knowledgeDocuments, customers, conversations)
frontend: DashboardCharts component: 4 biểu đồ Recharts — Area (conversations), Bar (customers), Pie (channels), Horizontal Bar (bot perf)
Dashboard page: 4 stat cards (Bot AI, Kênh, Tài liệu, Khách hàng) thay thế cũ, mỗi card là Link đến module tương ứng

commits.message: chore: save-brain - payment fixes (chỉ .brain files, không code)

decisions: Stats endpoint trả 4 datasets cùng lúc (1 API call) thay vì tách riêng
Dùng Prisma groupBy + JS fill missing days (không raw SQL)
Recharts 3.8 cho charts (lightweight, React-native)
Dashboard cards chuyển từ quota-based sang resource-count-based (_count)
Mỗi stat card là Link navigable tới module tương ứng
next_steps: Commit Dashboard Analytics changes (7 files)
Thêm date range selector (presets 7d/14d/30d/90d + custom picker)
Thêm KPI summary row (tổng conversations, customers, bot response rate)
Auto-aggregation granularity (day/week/month) dựa trên range
Test charts với data thật (production tenant)
E2E payment test vẫn pending từ phiên trước
open_questions: Cần pagination/limit cho stats khi data lớn (>90 ngày)?
Có cần export chart data ra CSV/Excel?
Bot performance nên tính theo conversations hay messages?

entries.summary: Fix payment module bugs: duplicate orders from React StrictMode, pending conflict UX (resume/cancel flow), transaction history auto-refresh on modal close. All committed to main.

backend: GET /sellers/me/payment-orders/pending: new endpoint returning order + QR + bankInfo for resume flow
findPendingBySeller: new service method finding latest PENDING order by sellerId
Route order fix: /pending before /:id/status to prevent NestJS param conflict
frontend: PaymentModal: useRef guard preventing StrictMode double order creation
PaymentModal: pending_conflict state with Resume/Cancel buttons
PaymentModal: detect 409 Conflict with 'chưa hoàn tất' message for smart error UX
TransactionHistory: auto-refresh via React key prop on modal close
Removed unreliable onOrderChange callback, replaced with onClose refresh pattern

commits.message: feat(payment): fix duplicate orders, pending conflict UX & tx history refresh

decisions: useRef guard for StrictMode: safe in production (guard is transparent when effect runs once)
Pending conflict: show resume/cancel options instead of generic error
Transaction history refresh: use React key prop (force remount) instead of prop-based refresh (unreliable due to closure stale callback in useEffect)
Refresh on modal close: simplest and most reliable approach, covers all cases
next_steps: Test full E2E payment: create order → bank transfer → webhook → subscription activated
Test pending_conflict UX: resume existing order vs cancel+retry
Restore plan prices before production (currently 2000/2300/2500 for testing)
Consider adding toast notifications on payment success
Continue manual E2E testing for Bot-Channel Binding (62 test cases)
open_questions: SePay webhook latency in production (real bank transfer delay)?
Should we add a 'cancel and create new' option directly in the payment modal timer view?

entries.summary: Hoàn thành toàn bộ feature Bot-Channel Binding (8/8 phases). Schema migration, BE API, FE UI cho Agents/Channels/Knowledge/Chat. Đã commit + push lên main. TSC + ESLint + Build đều pass. Đang chờ manual E2E test.

database: Agent: thêm isDefault boolean, isActive default false
ChannelConnection: thêm agentId FK (nullable, onDelete: SetNull)
AgentKnowledge: bảng junction mới cho N:M Agent ↔ KnowledgeDocument
backend: Agent delete: guard isDefault, cascade SET NULL channels
KnowledgeSearch: scoped theo agent's linked documents
Tenant: auto-create default bot khi tạo tenant mới
frontend: Agents page: channel checkboxes, knowledge checkboxes, badge mặc định, delete guard
Channels page: BotAssignment dropdown, confirm dialog, warning states
Knowledge page: bot badges trên documents, filter-by-bot dropdown
Chat: null guard cho agent name (Chưa gán bot fallback)

decisions: 1:N Bot→Channel (1 bot serves N channels, 1 channel has 1 bot)
Knowledge thuộc Tenant level, bot chọn qua N:M junction AgentKnowledge
Delete bot → SET NULL trên channels (không xoá channel)
Delete bot → CASCADE xoá AgentKnowledge rows (knowledge docs giữ nguyên)
Mỗi tenant có 1 default bot (isDefault=true, không cho xoá)
Channel mới → không auto-assign bot
Reassign bot trên channel → confirm dialog bắt buộc
Bot inactive + channel → không auto-reply, tin nhắn hiện Chat cho nhân viên
next_steps: Chạy 62 manual test cases (xem manual_test_plan.md)
Test gửi tin nhắn thật từ FB/Zalo với bot active/inactive
Fix knowledge sync gap: create mode agent không sync knowledge (chỉ edit mode)
Cân nhắc viết automated API tests cho 15 business rules
Dọn file test-snapshot.js nếu còn sót
open_questions: Khi quota hết bot (VD: Free plan chỉ 1 bot), FE có block nút tạo bot không?
Có cần notification khi bot bị inactive mà channel vẫn có traffic?
Future: Instagram/Website widget channel types

entries.summary: Roadmap Post-MVP Finalized. Defined features for multi-instance scaling, 4-tier pricing, multimodal input, and Subdomain Landing Page architecture.
project_changes: Updated roadmap-post-mvp.md with detailed multi-instance scaling tasks
Defined 4-tier pricing structure (Free, Basic, Standard, Premium)
Added Bám đuổi khách hàng (Retargeting) feature specifications
Added Hỗ trợ đa phương thức (Multimodal Vision & Audio) specifications
Separated Landing Page architecture into Subdomain model (aichatbot.vn vs app.aichatbot.vn)

commits.message: docs: finalize post-MVP roadmap (scaling, pricing, landing page architecture)

decisions: Use 4-tier pricing model: Free (7 days), Basic (299k), Standard (599k), Premium (1.199k)
Upsell high-value features (Follow-up 24h, Multimodal) in higher tiers
Use Subdomain architecture for Landing Page (aichatbot.vn) and Web App (app.aichatbot.vn) to optimize SEO and load times
next_steps: Website Chat Widget
Landing Page implementation
Payment Integration (Stripe/VNPay)

entries.summary: Phase 10 FE sync: axios baseURL → /api/v1, auto-unwrap response interceptor. Chat bubble overflow fix: break-all + overflow-hidden.
project_changes: axios.ts: baseURL appended /api/v1, response interceptor auto-unwrap { success, data }
axios.ts: error interceptor extracts message from standard format
ChatWindow.tsx: break-all + overflow-hidden on bubble div, overflow-x-hidden on scroll container, min-w-0 on flex wrapper
frontend_plan.md: Phase 10 + chat fix noted, priority → Phase 11
decisions: Auto-unwrap at axios level — service layer doesn't need changes (response.data stays same)
break-all over break-words — more aggressive, guaranteed to wrap long unbroken strings
overflow-x-hidden on scroll container — prevents horizontal scroll from long text
next_steps: Phase 11: Testing & Hardening
E2E test full CRM flow

entries.summary: Phase 06E — Real-time CRM WebSocket complete. useSocket hook with reconnect detection, 3 socket event handlers with dedup + error boundaries, reconnect data resync, conversation store addConversation + auto-sort.
project_changes: useSocket.ts: Socket.IO connection hook (JWT auth, reconnect detection via reconnectCount, jitter)
conversation-store.ts: addConversation + updateConversationLocally with auto-sort by lastMessageAt
page.tsx: wire 3 socket events (new_message, conversation_updated, new_conversation)
page.tsx: reconnect resync effect (re-fetch conversations + messages)
page.tsx: error boundaries (try-catch) on all WS event handlers
page.tsx: dedup fix for race condition (WS event vs HTTP response)
socket.io-client added to package.json
decisions: reconnectCount pattern — hook signals reconnect, page decides what to refetch
Error boundaries — all WS handlers wrap try-catch to prevent silent crashes
Dedup in both optimistic update AND WS handler — prevents race condition
Stale closure prevention via useRef for selectedConvId in socket callbacks
next_steps: Phase 10: Self-serve API & Polish
Phase 11: Testing & Hardening
open_questions: Sound/visual notification cho messages ở conversation không đang xem?
SocketProvider context nếu cần WS ở nhiều routes?

Token usage display: hiện promptTokens↓ completionTokens↑ = totalTokens cho mỗi bot response

Upload zone dùng FormData native + axios multipart/form-data header override

entries.summary: Hoàn thành SPRINT 3 (Agent CRUD UI) + Dark/Light/System Mode. TSC 0 errors, ESLint 0 errors.
project_changes: Thêm agent.service.ts — CRUD API layer cho Agent (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE)
Thêm agent-store.ts — Zustand store với hasLoaded pattern, optimistic toggle, reset khi đổi tenant
Thêm AgentCard: hiện status bar, model chip, greeting preview, toggle/edit/delete actions
Thêm AgentEmptyState: empty state với CTA tạo bot đầu tiên
Thêm AgentFormModal: key-based remount form (React 19 compliant), name/persona/greeting/model/temperature/maxTokens
Thêm AgentDeleteDialog: confirm dialog với tên bot echo
Thêm /dashboard/agents/page.tsx + loading.tsx: tenant-aware, error banner, grid layout 1/2/3 cols
Thêm ThemeProvider (next-themes, attribute=class, defaultTheme=system)
Thêm ThemeToggle: dropdown mở lên trên (bottom-full), 3 options Light/Dark/System, Check icon active
Sidebar footer redesign: pill container với logout + divider + theme toggle
Fix globals.css: @custom-variant dark cho Tailwind CSS v4 (không dùng media query)
Fix layout.tsx: fetchTenants() hoisted lên DashboardLayout — fix bug agent page không có tenant data
decisions: AgentFormModal dùng key remount (key=agent.id|'create') thay vì useEffect+setState vì React 19 strict rule (set-state-in-effect).
useSyncExternalStore thay useEffect+setState để detect client mount (ThemeToggle), tránh hydration mismatch.
fetchTenants() được đặt ở layout.tsx chứ không phải dashboard/page.tsx để mọi sub-route đều có activeTenant.
Tailwind v4 dùng @custom-variant dark thay vì darkMode: 'class' trong config (v4 không có config file).
ThemeToggle dropdown mở bottom-full để tránh tràn sidebar footer.
next_steps: BE Phase 04: LLM Integration — tạo ConversationModule, tích hợp OpenAI SDK, endpoint POST /chat
FE Sprint 4: Knowledge RAG UI — upload document, view chunks, liên kết với Agent
FE Sprint 5: Live Chat UI — widget chat, kết nối agent + conversation API

entries.summary: Hoàn thành SPRINT 2 (Authentication & Tenant Onboarding). Cấu trúc lại AuthGuard Supabase backend. Tích hợp Zustand và Next.js loading ở FE.
project_changes: Hoàn tất cấu hình API Route Auth Callback ở FE.
Xoá Passport-JWT, thay thế bằng Supabase Edge validation ở Backend (AuthGuard).
Triển khai Tenant Store (Zustand) tự động load & tự sinh Slug.
decisions: Không dùng PassportModule để chứng thực JWT Supabase nữa, mà dùng thư viện API SDK của Supabase trực tiếp do nó bắt buộc chuẩn ECC P-256.
Thiết kế Frontend Store với Zustand và chia nhỏ Loading UI chuẩn SSR.
next_steps: Chuyển sang Sprint 3: Tạo UI Danh sách Agent/Bot và kết nối DTO tạo bot.
